scripts.seo:gsc:doctor: gsc auth status && gsc sites list --format table && gsc doctor
scripts.seo:gsc:submit: gsc sitemaps submit https://lonelyguy.tech/sitemap.xml --site https://lonelyguy.tech/ --format table
scripts.seo:gsc:analytics: gsc analytics query --site https://lonelyguy.tech/ --days 28 --dimension page,query --format json > .seo-reports/gsc-analytics.json
